title: Mark Smythe, Composer and Professor, Dies on Hiking Trail at 53
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

Mark Smythe, a New Zealand-born and L.A.-based composer, died Saturday after a medical emergency on the Mount Wilson hiking trail near Los Angeles. He was 53.

TheL.A. Coroner’s office reportedthat the cause of death was cardiovascular disease. The rescue team said in a statement, “Sierra Madre Search and Rescue extends our condolences to the family and friends of the deceased man. We also extend our thanks to the man’s friends and other hikers who assisted today.”

Smythe was nominated for an SCL Award and a World Soundtrack Award for his score for Hulu’s “The Reef: Stalked” in 2023. Among his other composing credits were horror movie “The Possessed,” rom-com “Love You Like That,” horror movie “Boar” and war adventure “Unfallen.” He was selected as a Composer Fellow for the 2024 Choral Arts Initiative PREMIERE|Project Festival, which included the premiere of his “Song of the Sea – Part I” for choir and electric guitar.

He also served as COO of the Society of Composers and Lyricists for several years. Smythe was a frequent participant and guest at The Night Temple, a composer community with monthly performances. The next performance on Saturday evening will be hosted in his honor.

Composer Bear McCreary paid tribute to Smythe on Facebook, writing “I’m shaken to hear of the shocking and untimely passing of Mark Smythe, a prominent figure in the Los Angeles film scoring community, particularly with the Society of Composers and Lyricists, and a talented composer in his own right. Mark’s enthusiasm and humor were off the charts. He brought a shark with a bowtie to the red carpet of an SCL awards ceremony when he was nominated for his work on a shark movie – hilarious! When he found out I was writing a metal album, he curated his favorite German folk metal bands for me (turning me on to his favorite band, Finsterforst).”

Smythe played in several rock bands in New Zealand and has a masters in screen composition from the Australian Film, Television and Radio School. He taught media composition at Cal State University, Northridge and served as Department Head of Composing for Visual Media at Los Angeles College of Music.
title_zh: 作曲家及教授馬克·史邁斯(Mark Smythe)於53歲時在健行小徑上去世。
content_zh:
由帕特·薩佩斯坦 (Pat Saperstein) 撰寫

副編輯

來自紐西蘭、現居洛杉磯的作曲家馬克·史邁斯 (Mark Smythe) 於週六在洛杉磯附近的威爾遜山健行小徑上因醫療緊急情況去世，享年53歲。

洛杉磯驗屍官辦公室報告稱，死因為心血管疾病。救援隊在聲明中表示：“西耶拉·馬德雷搜索與救援隊對這位逝者的家人和朋友表示哀悼。我們也感謝今天協助的朋友和其他健行者。”

史邁斯於2023年因為為Hulu的《暗礁：追蹤者》(The Reef: Stalked) 創作的配樂而獲得SCL獎和世界電影配樂獎提名。他的其他作曲作品包括恐怖電影《附身》(The Possessed)、浪漫喜劇《愛你如此》(Love You Like That)、恐怖電影《野豬》(Boar) 和戰爭冒險片《未墮落》(Unfallen)。他被選為2024年合唱藝術倡議PREMIERE|Project音樂節的作曲家獎學金獲得者，該音樂節包括他為合唱團和電吉他創作的《海之歌 – 第一部分》(Song of the Sea – Part I) 的首演。

他還曾擔任作曲家和作詞家協會的首席運營官多年。史邁斯經常參加並作為嘉賓出席“夜之殿堂”(The Night Temple)，這是一個每月舉行表演的作曲家社群。下週六晚上的表演將以他的名義舉行。

作曲家貝爾·麥克瑞 (Bear McCreary) 在Facebook上向史邁斯致敬，寫道：“得知馬克·史邁斯的驚人和過早的去世，我感到震驚。他是洛杉磯電影配樂界的知名人物，特別是在作曲家和作詞家協會中，也是位才華橫溢的作曲家。馬克的熱情和幽默感無與倫比。他在被提名為一部鯊魚電影的作品時，還帶著一隻系著蝴蝶結的鯊魚走上SCL頒獎典禮的紅地毯——太搞笑了！當他得知我在寫金屬專輯時，他為我策劃了他最喜愛的德國民謠金屬樂隊（讓我接觸到他最喜愛的樂隊Finsterforst）。”

史邁斯曾在紐西蘭的幾個搖滾樂隊中演出，並擁有澳大利亞電影、電視和廣播學校的螢幕作曲碩士學位。他在加州州立大學北嶺分校教授媒體作曲，並擔任洛杉磯音樂學院視覺媒體作曲系的系主任。

由帕特·薩佩斯坦 (Pat Saperstein) 撰寫

副編輯

來自紐西蘭、現居洛杉磯的作曲家馬克·史邁斯 (Mark Smythe) 於週六在洛杉磯附近的威爾遜山健行小徑上因醫療緊急情況去世，享年53歲。

洛杉磯驗屍官辦公室報告稱，死因為心血管疾病。救援隊在聲明中表示：“西耶拉·馬德雷搜索與救援隊對這位逝者的家人和朋友表示哀悼。我們也感謝今天協助的朋友和其他健行者。
